SPACE WEEK
LogoColoursTypographyVisual languageApplicationsDownloads
Brand portal

Logo system

A civic mark for space.

The logo brings together an outline fox, a subtle orbit and Leicester’s skyline. It is the clearest expression of the Leicester Space Week identity.

Primary logoClear spaceMinimum sizeIncorrect use

Primary logo

Use it with intent.

The primary stacked logo is our preferred signature for official communications, campaign covers, large-format print and high-impact digital spaces.

Approved colours

On light backgrounds

Use the full-colour mark on Paper White or light neutral backgrounds. Do not add effects, outlines or a container.

Download SVG

Clear space

Give the crest room.

Keep a clear area around the logo equal to the height of the “L” in Leicester. This area must be free of type, imagery and competing marks.

X = cap height of the wordmark

Minimum size

Stay legible.

120

Digital

Use the primary logo no smaller than 120 px wide. For tighter spaces, use a simplified icon mark.

25

Print

Use the primary logo no smaller than 25 mm wide. Keep fine skyline details crisp in production.

32

Icon

The mark-only icon may be used at 32 px or 10 mm minimum, including for avatars and favicons.

Incorrect use

Keep it precise.

✓

Use approved colourways

Use the full-colour version on a light field or the reverse version on Orbit Navy.

×

Never decorate the logo

Do not stretch, rotate, recolour, add gradients, shadows, borders or busy imagery behind the mark.

LEICESTER
SPACE WEEK

A shared visual language for an ambitious city of science, discovery and collaboration.

Brand guidelines · v1.0 · 2026
